{# Theme layout override for the deprecated V2 docs build. #} {# Injects into every page's so #} {# search engines drop these V2 pages from their results. The canonical link is #} {# emitted automatically by Sphinx from html_baseurl in conf.py, so do NOT add a #} {# here (duplicate canonicals are a defect). #} {% extends "!layout.html" %} {% block extrahead %} {{ super() }} {% endblock %}
